data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Invoice generation and aging status', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or validation of this functionality. The absence of any evidence related to invoice generation or aging status indicates a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of invoice generation and aging status being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
